chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: So cook your vegetables to your desired taste.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: But things like Brussels sprouts, overcooking can actually bring undesirable flavors out

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid

chunks.text: So next time, try not cooking your vegetables as much as you usually do, and you might just

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Using a dull knife when cooking.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Common misconception.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: People think that a sharp knife is more dangerous.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Wrong.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: If you have a dull knife, when you're cutting, first off, it's a lot harder.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: You have to apply a lot more pressure to cut what you're doing.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: You're already in a more dangerous position.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: But in addition to that, it's easier to slip.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: I'm applying pressure, and my knife is able to slip off of this without cutting the potato.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Your fingers aren't prepped for that, or it falls over.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: You're way more likely to cut yourself.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Solution.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Use a sharp knife.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Buy a knife sharpener.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Just make it safer for yourself, because look at this.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: You see how easy that was?

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: No resistance.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Much less likely to cut myself.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Also, if I cut myself with a sharp knife, it's way better for healing than a dull knife.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: This rips and tears.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: This is a surgical blade.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Not using enough salt or fat when cooking anything.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Most things need more salt and more fat than you think.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Remember that.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: A lot of the times when people cook, they think they've hit the ceiling with flavor

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: and texture in their food.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: But oftentimes, the bar is much higher, and it can be reached by adding a little bit more

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: salt or a little bit more fat than you usually would.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Push the boundaries that you have in your mind, and you may fly.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: That also applies to life.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Not cleaning as you go.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: The problem is, you keep getting more cluttered and more cluttered.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: I just finished cooking my steak, but now I'm about to make my sides.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: The solution.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Put your stuff away.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Wipe everything down.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Move things off the surface and somewhere where they can rest.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Wipe off all your surfaces.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: If it needs cleaning solution, just do it now.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Not moving food constantly while it cooks.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: So this doesn't apply to every scenario, but by frequently moving your food around in the

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: pan while you are frying or searing it, it will help with an even cook and even browning.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: See, if I didn't move these chips around when I'm frying, then they'd have different brown

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: spots unevenly.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: But look how beautifully, evenly golden these are.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: And they cooked more quickly.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: Another example of this is actually with toast.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: You guys see me doing this all the time.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
chunks.text: If you're toasting bread and butter, I call this the record scratcher.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid

chunks.text: That is an industry secret right there.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid

chunks.text: For example, we've got some grapes, some berries.

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid

chunks.title: 50 Food Mistakes You Need To Avoid
